arts.ttl: Barcelona and Real Madrid meet in Copa del Rey final with more than a trophy on the line
arts.sum: Barcelona and Real Madrid meet in the Copa del Rey final on Saturday with more than just the trophy on the line for the fierce Spanish rivals. Barcelona dominated their other two meetings this season, beating Madrid 5-2 in the Spanish Super Cup final in January after winning 4-0 at Madrid in the league in October.

arts.ttl: Ter Stegen in Copa del Rey Final squad
arts.sum: After a recovery process that has taken almost all season, captain and goalkeeper Marc-Andre ter Stegen has been declared full over his knee injury and is among the players that will be heading to Andalusia. Ter Stegen back after 215 days

arts.ttl: Real Madrid TV Release Video of Referee Ahead of Copa del Rey Final - Here's Why
arts.sum: An explanation on why Real Madrid TV have released a video of the referee ahead of their 2025 Copa del Rey final vs Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Barcelona vs. Real Madrid: Will Kylian Mbappe start for Los Blancos in El Clasico?
arts.sum: Real Madrid's leading goalscorer Kylian Mbappe is in line to start against Barcelona in the Copa del Rey final on Saturday night.

arts.ttl: La Liga Title Race: Barcelona, Real Madrid, Atletico Madrid Next Five Games After Matchweek 33
arts.sum: Barcelona and Real Madrid are pulling away from Atlético Madrid in the La Liga title race.
